_note: Uses Fritz's real Cash App $cashtag ($FAMtasticFritz). If you OMIT the cashtag here, the generator falls back to payment.cashapp.cashtag in platform/config/owner-profile.json. The link https://cash.app/$FAMtasticFritz/<total> is a P2P nudge; for a guaranteed amount use an official Cash App Payment Link via method:link.
